sign_in_message: sign in to manage your account
otp_message: Enter the otp sent to your email below.
otp_confirm: Your OTP has been verified. Please enter your new password below to complete the reset process.
enter_email_to_search: Please enter your email address to search for your account
welcome_message: Here's a summary of your account activity for this week.
add_business_lic_instruction: Add your business name and license number
welcome_sub_statement: Create a beautiful storefront, manage inventory, and get paid — all from one dashboard.
sales_performance_monthly_desc: Bar chart showing monthly orders with gradual growth and an August spike. Values: Jan 2, Feb 1, Mar 3, Apr 2, May 4, Jun 3, Jul 2, Aug 9, Sep 4, Oct 5, Nov 6, Dec 7.
onboarding_to_payout_streamlined: From onboarding to payout - it's all streamlined.
beautiful_storefront_desc: Create your own branded shop with custom themes, logos, and galleries.
payments_and_payouts_desc: Secure checkout, multiple gateways, daily payouts.
integrated_logistics_desc: Real-time rates, labels, and tracking updates.
sales_analytics_desc: SKU insights, conversion, and repeat buyers.
marketing_tools_desc: Discount codes, bundles, abandoned-cart emails, and SEO.
trust_and_support_desc: Dispute centre, customer reviews, and 24/7 assistance so you’re never alone
step_1_desc: Register, complete KYC, and set up your store profile and policies.
step_2_desc: Upload listings, choose shipping options, and define pricing & taxes.
step_3_desc: Promote your store with built-in marketing and watch the sales roll in.
testimonial_1_quote: We doubled our monthly orders within 60 days. The dashboard makes inventory and promotions effortless.
testimonial_2_quote: Integrated shipping saved us hours each day. Payouts are always on time.
faq_sub: Everything you need to know to get started.
faq_q1: How quickly can I start selling?
faq_a1: Most vendors go live the same day after submitting required documents and adding their first products.
faq_a2: Funds are released to your bank account daily. You can track all transactions in your vendor wallet.
faq_q3: Can I use my own shipping?
faq_a3: Yes. Use integrated carriers or connect your preferred courier with custom rates.
faq_a4: No monthly fees. We only charge a small commission per order to keep the lights on.
contact_support_text: For support, questions, or complaints, you can reach us at info@3bayti.ae or call 0507967776.
privacy_policy_text: We protect your personal data under UAE Federal Data Protection Law. Your information is only used to provide services, kept confidential, and never shared without consent or legal requirement.
refund_policy_text: Products may be returned or exchanged within 3 working days of delivery, provided they are unused and in original condition. Items are only refundable if defective or incorrect.
shipping_policy_text: Orders are fulfilled directly by sellers and delivered through approved logistics partners. Delivery times and costs vary by store and are shown at checkout.
terms_and_conditions_text: By using 3bayti, you agree to our terms covering sellers, buyers, data protection, returns, and dispute resolution under UAE law. The platform acts only as an intermediary between sellers and buyers.
create_free_vendor_account: Create your free vendor account and start selling today.
no_top_selling_products_body: There isn’t enough sales data to rank products. Grow traffic and orders to unlock this chart.
tip_feature_best_items: Feature best items in your store
tip_rankings_appear: Tip: Rankings appear after you receive a few completed orders.
off_to_a_fresh_start_body: Every big shop starts at zero — your first sale is close.
no_measurements_found: No measurements found for your store.
vendor_compliance_instruction_title: Vendor Compliance Instruction – Upload of Identification Documents
vendor_compliance_instruction_body: To comply with regulatory and security requirements, all vendors are required to provide a valid government-issued identification document. Please carefully follow the instructions below when uploading your ID card:
vendor_compliance_upload_title: Vendor Compliance — Upload of ID Card
step_upload_both_sides_desc_intro: You must upload two separate images:
step_upload_front: Front of ID Card (photo, name, and ID number)
step_upload_back: Back of ID Card (additional details, barcode, or signature)
step_image_quality_clear: Images must be clear, in color, and not blurry.
step_image_quality_corners: All four corners of the ID card must be visible.
step_image_quality_no_glare: Avoid glare, shadows, or cropped edges.
step_data_accuracy_valid: The ID card must be valid and unexpired.
step_data_accuracy_match: Details on the ID must match your vendor profile.
step_confidentiality_body: Uploaded documents are stored securely and used solely for identity verification and compliance purposes.
notifications_subtext: Customize your alerts - get only the updates you care about, exactly when you want them.
notif_new_order_body: Get alerted the moment a new order is placed, including items, total, and delivery method.
notif_order_cancelled_body: Be notified when an order is cancelled (by you or the buyer), with reason and affected items.
notif_custom_order_body: Receive a notice when a customer submits a custom order request, including specs and due date.
notif_refund_initiated_body: Get a prompt when a buyer requests a refund, with order ID and next steps required.
notif_listing_status_body: Know when a product is approved, rejected, or moved between draft/active/hidden.
notif_payment_scheduled_body: Heads-up when a payout is scheduled, showing amount, date, and orders included.
notif_payment_completed_body: Confirmation that your payout was sent, with transaction reference and breakdown.
notif_new_review_body: Alert when a buyer leaves a rating or review, including stars and comment preview.
notif_weekly_summary_body: A weekly snapshot of sales, orders, traffic, and returns.
notif_monthly_summary_body: A monthly report with trends, bestsellers, and improvement tips.
notif_low_engagement_body: Notification when views or clicks drop below a set threshold, with suggestions to boost visibility.
security_2fa_subtext: Add an extra layer of security with two-step verification.
security_2fa_locked: This setting is locked by security policy.
security_change_password_subtext: Keep your account secure - update your password now.
profile_update_subtext: Keep your information up to date
email_edit_notice: For security reasons, your name and email can’t be edited here. Please contact Support to request an update: support@3bayti.ae.
